subject: Welcome to PCB Workspace Access — SERC
text:
Hi buyer@example.com,

Welcome to PCB Workspace Access from SERC (Space Robotics Creations)!
We’re excited to have you onboard.

Your account is now active and you can start using the software right away.
Getting started video (same as PCB Workspace Access): https://YOUR_VIDEO_LINK

If you need support, contact us at spaceroboticscreations@outlook.com.

— SERC Team
